name: Kibbi Neeyee
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cracked wheat several times in cold water and let it stand in water for about 1 hour.
2. Grind the meat and onions finely.
3. Mix the ground meat, onions, seasonings (salt, black pepper, and ground cinnamon), and wheat together.
4. If needed, moisten your hands with a small amount of cold water to help with mixing.
5. Thoroughly mix or knead the mixture until it is well combined.
6. Kibbi may be fried, baked on a baking sheet, broiled, or baked with a filling.
7. When using a filling, spread half of the kibbi into a greased 10x10 inch pan.
8. Ensure the mixture reaches all edges of the pan.
9. Add the filling to the center of the pan.
10. Top with the remaining half of the kibbi.
11. Use a knife to seal the layers around the edge of the pan.
12. Cut into portions, no deeper than the top layer, until fully browned.
13. Serves 10 to 12 people.
